metaTitle: Used Brewery Equipment Chicago IL | Beverage Equipment Traders
metaDescription: New and used brewery equipment shipping to Chicago, IL. Brewhouses, fermenters, canning lines, rigging, and installation. Ships from San Marcos, CA.
intro: Shipping brewery and beverage equipment to Chicago and the Midwest from our San Marcos, CA facility.
bodyContent:
Chicago is a major hub for craft brewery production in the Midwest, with a dense operator community and significant equipment demand for both new builds and capacity expansions. Beverage Equipment Traders ships equipment to Chicago and surrounding Midwest markets from our San Marcos facility.

Freight to Chicago typically runs 3 to 4 business days. For large systems and full facility installations, our rigging crews travel to the Chicago market. Contact us for current inventory, freight quotes, and rigging availability for your Chicago location.

labels.shippingNote: Shipping from San Marcos, CA to {city}. Rigging and installation available.
labels.sidebarBody: We ship anywhere in the US. Bonded freight, crated or pad-wrapped. Rigging at destination available.
facts: Crated or pad-wrapped based on equipment
Lead times confirmed at time of purchase
labels.finalCtaBody: We ship from San Marcos, CA. Every piece is photographed and condition-documented before it leaves our yard.
